tweets.text:
I kept re-explaining the same project to my AI.
Every. Single. Session.

So I built A2CR.

Save your work state at milestones with WorkBaton.
Resume in Claude, Cursor, Codex, Gemini — no re-explanation.

AI is forgetful by nature. A2CR isn't.

→ https://t.co/U1QaneROfi
